test.name: Extract assertions from John Becker's 1926 Vine Street Hill burial index entry
test.description: Vine Street Hill Cemetery (Cincinnati, Hamilton County, Ohio) burial index entry for John Becker, buried 30 Sep 1926 (ark:/61903/1:1:CRYM-V53Z). Real record from the Ferber/Becker research (#799). The entry associates John with 'Anna' - part of the unresolved Anna/Mary Kramer name conflict.

input.user_message:
Extract assertions from this cemetery burial index entry:

Ohio, Hamilton, Cincinnati, Vine Street Hill Cemetery Index of Burials, 1851-1986
FamilySearch ark:/61903/1:1:CRYM-V53Z

Name: John Becker
Death date: 27 September 1926
Burial date: 30 September 1926
Cemetery: Vine Street Hill Cemetery, Cincinnati, Hamilton County, Ohio
Associated person: Anna (recorded as his spouse; no surname given)

judge_context: Death date (27 Sep 1926) and burial date (30 Sep 1926) are DIRECT evidence - recorded at/near the burial event
Burial place is Vine Street Hill Cemetery, Cincinnati, Hamilton County, Ohio (from the collection/entry)

The associated spouse is recorded only as 'Anna' with no surname - extract it exactly as stated ('Anna'); do NOT supply a surname or reconcile it with the 'Mary Kramer'/'Anna Kramer' seen on other records (that is a downstream conflict, not an extraction fix)
Source classification is DERIVATIVE - an index of the cemetery's burial records
Informant is unknown on this index entry; information quality is indeterminate
This is a burial index: expect death/burial facts for John, not a full biographical set
